identity.name: NightOwl Parents
identity.aesthetic: Night Light - Deep warm grays, soft amber glows, cozy atmosphere

headings.usage: Use for all section titles, modal headers, and hero text. The rounded nature of Nunito feels friendly and safe.

body.usage: Use for all paragraph text, inputs, and chat messages. High readability in low light.

mono.usage: Use sparingly for timestamps or technical data if needed.

layout.grid_strategy: Use 'Bento' grids for dashboard summaries. Use single-column feeds for mobile readability.
layout.mobile_first: Bottom navigation bar for primary actions on mobile. Large touch targets (min 44px).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full font-bold shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(245,197,66,0.3)] transition-all hover:scale-105

cards.default: bg-card border border-border/50 rounded-2xl shadow-soft hover:border-primary/30 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-input/50 border-transparent focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 rounded-xl h-12

hero.alt: Silhouette of parent holding baby in soft light
hero.usage: Hero section background or main visual

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add '@fontsource/nunito' and '@fontsource/dm-sans' to package.json immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to use the specific colors defined in 'colors.palette'. Do not rely on default shadcn zinc colors.
3. DARK MODE DEFAULT: Force dark mode by default. The app is designed for night use. Add 'dark' class to html/body.
4. ROUNDED CORNERS: Use 'rounded-2xl' or 'rounded-3xl' for modals and cards to feel softer and safer.
5. NO HARSH BORDERS: Use 'border-white/5' or 'border-white/10' for subtle separation. Avoid solid 1px gray borders.
6. WARM GLOWS: Use the 'warm_glow' shadow on primary actions to simulate a night light.
7. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element has a data-testid attribute.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry and interesting grids.
Micro-interactions: Add hover states to everything. Buttons should scale slightly. Cards should lift.
Glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur on sticky headers and floating action buttons.
Accessibility: Ensure text contrast is sufficient (4.5:1) even in dark mode. Use lighter grays for text, not dark gray.
